titleStmt.title: SII 18.155: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 155. (B.K. No. 81 of 1932-33.) HĀVĒRI, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Broken slab in the temple of Siddhēśvara.

summary.p: This inscription, which gives the origin and genealogy of the Chālukya kings, is broken off after the description of Pratāpachakravarti Jagadēkamalla. It may be noted hat it is one of the few stone inscriptions which gives the origin of the later Chālukya family.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© Ōṁ namaḥ śivāya(ḥ) . nama(ḥ)stuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkya
nagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . jaḷaruhanābhana nābhiya jaḷajado
ḷudiyisida jaḷajajātana karadoḷu cuḷukōdakadiṁdogedatibaḷaniṁdādudu
caḷukyabhūpāḷakuḷa . Ā caḷukyarājānvayadoḷ raseyaṁ raseguyvasu
rananasamabhujābaḷade samarasamayadoḷuṟe maḻdisi taṁda
cakriyaṁ neneyisuvaṁ bhujābaḷamahatvadiṁ tailanṛpa . tailapadēvanagrata
nayaṁ kalisattiganātanātmajaṁ śrīlalanādhipaṁ negaḷda vikramanātana tamma
nudviṣatbhūlatikākuṭhāranenipaṁ daśavarmmanṛpaṁ tadātmajaṁ śrīlategāda
ḍarppenisi pāḷisidaṁ jayasiṁhanurvviya . ka . Apratimallaṁ jayasiṁ
hapriyatanujātanesevanāhavamallaṁ paprabha māḷavadhārāprōdghāṭa
vidhānabhujadaṁḍa . Ātana nijatanayaṁ kṣatrakhyātaṁ permmāḍidēvanesedaṁ
jayaśrītaruṇīnavamaṇimayapūtamahāsiṁhapīṭha nijavijaya
bhuja . va . Ātana parākramamaṁ pēḷvaḍe . v® . kalikāḷāvanipāḷajā
ḷaciradorvvāpōpajātōddhatā khilakāluśyakaḷaṁkapankapaṭaḷaprakṣāḷanaṁ mā
ḍaleṁdolaviṁ tīrtthajaḷāvagāhanamanāgaṁ māḍutirppaṁte niccalvirppaḷjayala
kṣmikhaḍgajaḷadoḷ cāḷukyacakrēśana . kaṁ . Ātana tanujātaṁ jagatītaruṇakā
manuddhatāhavabhīmaṁ bhūtaḷalalāmanakhiḷakaḷātaruṇanavōtpaḷāgrasōmaṁ
sōma . v® . vinatārātiNpāḷamauḷimaṇigaḷu nakṣatramātmīyakīrttinavābhyuṁna
tacaṁdrikāprasaramōrantasthatāpaṁ jagajjanamellaṁ sucakōrakāvaḷiyenalsōmā
khyabhūcakradoḷ tanaganvartthavenalu virājisidapaṁ sōmēśvarōrvvīśvara . ka .
Aribhūpara tējada daḷḷuri magguvudormme tanna pesarggoḷalēnaccarivaḍe
dudo jagatītaḷabhīkaratarataravārivāri sōmēśvarana . Ā mahānubhā
vaṁge . Iṁgaḍaliṁge caṁdranudayādrige caṁḍamarīci rōhaṇōttuṁgamahā
mahīdharakana[�rghya]mahāmaṇi puṭṭuvantesōmaṁge samaṁtu puṭṭidanivam dhare
jīyenaleṁdu baṇnikuṁ saṁgatasatvanaṁ paḍedu viśvajanaṁ jagadēkamallana .
Ā pratāpacakravartti jagadēkamallavallabhana mahimeyaṁ pēḷvaḍe . v® . hari
dugdhāṁbhōdhiyoḷu viśramisi sukhadoḷaṁdirddanā . kūrmmarājaṁ piriduṁ pātāḷa paṁ
kaprathitaprithuḷadēśaṁgaḷaṁ pokkuśūkaranādaṁ bhōgibhōgaṁgaḷananavarataṁ sēvi
sutirddanatyādaradiṁ śrīmatpratāpakṣitapati dharaṇībhāramaṁ tāḷdidāgaḷ . dhareyaṁ
kīḷpaṭṭu muṁtāḷdidanucitaparīvāramaṁ tannoḷādaṁ dorekoṁḍī lōkamaṁ parvvidudanadhi
māṇisalkīgaḷatyādaradiṁ dō®daṁḍacaṁḍākriti taḷedanidaṁ tāne mēlāgi bhōgīśva
rddaḍā būbhujabhujavijayastaṁbhaśuṁbhadbhujaṁga . vīravirōdhibhūparesevaṁbina
madāṁdhadurvvāraṇavāraṇaṁgaḷa madaṁgaḷa naloḷ caṁḍōgravistāri re
ṁbanoḷaṁja ṁdu vīralakṣmi kūḍutirppaḷanu raktateyiṁ jagadēka
śrīprithivīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēśvara
ḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatpratāpacakrava
thāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttami
vallabha lakṣmige ra harmmya
sājade
barmmaṇa daṁḍa The remaining portion is broken off.
Digital edition of SII 18.155 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
